She was adding items when the total froze.

The page crashed when I clicked Pay now.
Hi Ana. I saw your message. What happened with the checkout?
I was testing the payment page when it crashed. I clicked Pay now, and the whole screen went blank.
Okay. What were you doing right before the crash?
I was adding three items to the cart, and the total was updating fine. The problem started at Pay now.
Got it. Is it intermittent, or does it happen every time?
It happens every time. It is not intermittent, so it is easy to reproduce.
Perfect. Can you send the error log and a screenshot?
I already attached both to the report. The severity is critical, because no one can pay.
The expected result is a payment screen; the actual result is a blank page.
The severity is critical, because no one can pay.
The bug is not intermittent; it happens every time.
I attached a screenshot and the error log.

Hi Ana, this is Lucas from the dev team. Thanks for the bug report on the checkout. I read it this morning, and it was very clear. I have one question about the environment. You wrote Chrome 120 on staging, but I was testing on Firefox yesterday, and I could not reproduce the crash. So it might be a browser problem. Can you try one more time on Chrome and on Edge, and send me the error log again? And while you were testing, did you see any red error messages on the screen? That detail would really help me find the root cause. Thanks a lot.

Hi team, it is Sofia with a quick update on the checkout bug. Ana found it yesterday while she was testing the payment page. When she clicked Pay now, the whole page crashed. The severity is critical, because no customer can complete a payment right now. We do have a temporary workaround: users can pay from the old checkout page while we fix the new one. Lucas is looking for the root cause at the moment. The bug is not intermittent, so it is easy to reproduce, and that is actually good news. I will send a full report by the end of the day.

First, Ana was testing the new checkout page during the sprint. Then she added three items to the cart and clicked Pay now. Next, the whole page crashed and showed a blank screen. After that, Ana wrote a clear bug report with the steps to reproduce and a screenshot. Finally, she set the severity to critical and sent the report to the developer.
